title: Full-Stack Web Developer Intern

title: Research Intern — Rural Technology
description: Conducted immersive field research in Nediamanickam village as part of Amrita's Live-in-Labs program. Applied Human-Centered Design (HCD) and Participatory Rural Appraisal (PRA) methodologies to identify community needs. Designed a water purification system addressing local contamination issues. Made evidence-based decision against solar panel installation after cost-benefit analysis.
key_achievements: Designed practical water purification solution tailored to village constraints; Applied HCD/PRA methodologies in real field conditions; Made data-driven decision against solar panels saving community resources; Bridged gap between advanced technology and rural ground reality; Published internal research report on sustainable village infrastructure

title: Campus Ambassador

key_achievements: Grew campus engagement for Unlox platform; Organized multiple campus-level awareness events; Built network of student adopters across departments

title: Core Member

key_achievements: Contributed to community AI projects and study groups; Mentored junior members on AI/ML fundamentals; Helped organize AI-focused workshops and knowledge-sharing sessions

title: Automation Engineer — GST & Operations

key_achievements: Automated GST invoice generation reducing manual effort by 80%; Built end-to-end workflow pipelines with n8n; Digitized critical business operations for family rice distribution enterprise; Applied enterprise automation thinking to small business context
